title: Everbuild Jetcem Rapid Set Cement, Fast Setting Repair Cement, Grey, 6 kg & Jetcem Rapid Set Cement, Fast Setting Repair Cement, Grey, 3 kg

Product 1: Repairs Cracks and Holes: Fills up to 25mm in one application (for deeper fill use Jetcem Rapid Setting Sand & Cement).
Product 1: Internal and External Use: Seals and repair cracks and holes in both internal and external environments.
Product 1: Fast Setting Properties: Fast setting properties suitable for repairs to concrete, stone and brick substrates

description: From the manufacturer Jetcem Rapid Set Cement Specifically formulated for rapid patching and repair solutions, Jetcem Rapid Set Cement is the ultimate cement based product suitable for when a fast repair job is needed. Its strong properties repair holes and cracks of up to 25mm in concrete, stone and bricks substrates. Suitable for both internal and external repairs Jetcem Rapid Set Cement is the perfect solution for repairing cracks on walls, floors, kerbstones, pointing brick and stone, along with sealing leaks and setting railings and posts. Discover the Benefits Rapid setting (30 minutes) Pre mixed, ready to use, just add water Fills holes up to 25mm in one application Internal and external repairs Suitable for holes up to 25mm in concrete, stone and brick Sets in the cold and wet Suitable for leak sealing in concrete based surfaces Available in 3kg and 6kg bags Rapid Setting Specifically formulated to provide a quick setting time of 30 minutes suitable for quick repair jobs. Deep Fill Repairs cracks and holes of up to 25mm depth in one applications. Internal and External Repairs Excellent weatherproof properties for use on substrates in both internal and external environments. Trusted by Professionals Trusted and well used by trade professional. Jetcem provides the perfect solution for leak sealing, pointing, patching and much more in brick, cement and stone substrates. About Everbuild Everbuild – A Sika Company are the UK and Ireland’s largest manufacturer of sealants, adhesives, DIY products, powders and building chemicals. Everbuild are proud to be home to the trade’s most respected products which have been enhanced over the years by class-leading research and facilities. With unique technology including i-Cure and Active Resin Technology, Everbuild’s product development activity is relentlessly setting industry standards at the highest quality and leading the field in solving the problems of the future, today.
